pages.text: Not every item comes from crafting.$(br2)Some materials, spellstones, fruits, scrolls, and high-tier relics appear in structure chests.$(br2)If you cannot find a recipe in the crafting table or JEI, the item may require exploration.
pages.title: Loot and Exploration

pages.text: You should pay special attention to these structures:$(br2)$(li)Ancient City chests$(br)$(li)End City treasure chests$(br)$(li)Bastion chests$(br)$(li)Ruined Portal chests$(br)$(li)Dungeons and Mineshafts$(br)$(li)Desert Temples and Jungle Temples$(br)$(li)Ocean Ruins, Shipwrecks, and Buried Treasure$(br)$(li)Stronghold corridors and crossings
pages.title: Common Structures

pages.text: Structure chests usually generate their contents when first opened.$(br2)If a chest has already been opened, changing loot tables later will not refresh its contents.$(br2)When testing loot, use a new world, newly generated chunks, or the /loot command.
pages.title: Testing Note
